priority_scoring_path: claude-llm: 100% reproducible purchase block, revenue-blocking: no item can be added via AI chat, force-close required to recover (crash-equivalent), core AI chat conversion flow completely broken on Android
severity_justification: The Add to Cart button is non-functional at 100% reproducibility on Android, meaning every user attempting to purchase through the SLAP AI chat is blocked — this is a revenue-blocking outage of the primary conversion flow. The force-close required to recover is crash-equivalent severity. Historical bugs FLIPPI-2180 (cart update failure, P0, 0.61 similarity) and FLIPPI-1597 (chat page lag regression, P0, 0.41 similarity) confirm this tier for cart/chat disruptions of this magnitude.
owner_reason: Shailja Rani is the assignee on the two closest matches (FLIPPI-1665, FLIPPI-1663, FLIPPI-1654), all of which are cart and checkout CTA failures in SLAP, making her the most likely owner for this Add to Cart freeze.
